title: Paystack Transaction
description: A Paystack transaction representing a payment initiated, processed, or verified through the Paystack API.

id.description: Unique numeric Paystack identifier for the transaction.

reference.description: Merchant-defined or Paystack-generated unique reference for the transaction.

amount.description: Transaction amount in the lowest denomination of the currency (kobo for NGN, pesewas for GHS, cents for USD/ZAR).

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code of the transaction.

gateway_response.description: Human-readable response message from the payment gateway or bank.

paid_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the transaction was paid.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the transaction record was created.

channel.description: Payment channel used for the transaction.

ip_address.description: IP address of the customer when initiating the transaction.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata supplied by the merchant when initializing the transaction.

fees.description: Paystack fees deducted from the amount, in the lowest denomination.

authorization.description: The reusable authorization object created from this transaction (for card transactions).
